# Always-On Skill

This skill is designed to be loaded into the workspace context automatically via `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (which uses `applyTo: "**"`).

What it provides:
- A lightweight, always-available SKILL.md for search/discovery.
- An example hook in `.github/hooks/always_on_hook.json` demonstrating lifecycle events.

If you want this skill to stop being loaded automatically, remove or modify `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.
